---
title: 'Cicero: Addressing Algorithmic and Architectural Bottlenecks in Neural Rendering
  by Radiance Warping and Memory Optimizations'
author:
- Yu Feng
- Zihan Liu
- Jingwen Leng
- Minyi Guo
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/isca24-cicero.pdf
code_source: https://github.com/SJTU-MVCLab/SpaRW-NeRF-Acceleration
journ: ISCA
year: 2024
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
ext_source: https://dl.acm.org/doi/abs/10.1145/3689340
pub_number: 80
---
